allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.schristiancollins.com/generaluser" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; $r.Links | Where-Object { $_.href -match '\\.zip|\\.sf2|GeneralUser' } | Select-Object href, outerHTML -First 20 | Format-List } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
